meta.title: TruthDB — One log. One truth.
meta.description: TruthDB is one system that stores, searches and protects your most important data — keeping a single permanent record that everything else is built from.

hero.ledePre: TruthDB is one system that stores, searches and protects your most important data — keeping a single permanent record that everything else is built from.
hero.ledeEmphasis: If it's in TruthDB, it's true.

oneSystem.heading: Replace five systems with one.
oneSystem.lede: Most teams bolt together a database, a search engine, a recommendation engine, an activity log and an audit trail. Every one is another copy of your data that can drift, break or disagree. TruthDB does all of it from a single source — so your data lives in one place, and it's always in agreement with itself.
oneSystem.beforeMeasure: 5 copies · 5 things to break · constant drift
oneSystem.afterBody: One copy of your data, doing every job at once — always consistent, nothing to keep in sync.

capabilities.intro: Each capability is a full vertical slice — built straight into the core, not bolted on as an afterthought. Use one, or use them together in a single request.

records.title: Records & transactions
records.body: Store and update structured data with guarantees you can trust — no half-finished writes, no surprises.

search.title: Instant search
search.body: Find anything across your data the moment it lands. Full-text search is always up to date.

ai.title: AI & recommendations
ai.body: Search by meaning, power recommendations and ground AI assistants — without a separate vector database.

history.title: Complete history
history.body: Every change is kept in order, so you can audit, replay or rewind to any moment in time.

capabilities.baseMeasure: one permanent record · everything derives from it

pillars.heading: Fast. Sealed. Incorruptible.
pillars.lede: Three promises we engineer for first — because for a system of record, they're the only ones that count.

performance.title: Fast, and stays fast.
performance.body: TruthDB runs close to the metal on hardware you choose, handling hundreds of thousands of operations a second — and it doesn't bog down as your data grows.

security.title: Sealed and self-contained.
security.body: It ships as a hardened appliance that runs on your own infrastructure. Your data never leaves your control, and there's no sprawl of loosely-connected services to lock down.

integrity.title: Nothing slips through.
integrity.body: Every record is checked the instant it's written and verified again every time it's read. Data can't be silently lost, corrupted or quietly changed underneath you.
integrity.stat: ↳ Verified end to end, on every read

pillars.underHood: Under the hood, for the engineers

install.intro: TruthDB arrives as a complete system — operating system included. There's nothing to assemble and no dependencies to chase.

boot.title: Boot the installer
boot.body: Start from the TruthDB image on a fresh machine. It brings everything it needs.

disks.title: Choose your disks
disks.body: Point it at your storage and confirm. It handles the rest — safely, with a clear prompt before anything is touched.

live.title: You're live
live.body: It reboots into a running system that starts itself and stays up. No babysitting required.

closing.heading: One log. One truth.
closing.lede: One permanent record. Every job it does derives from it. Start running your own in minutes.

footer.tagline: One log. One truth. The system of record for data you can't afford to lose.

comingSoon.title: TruthDB — Coming soon
comingSoon.headline: Coming soon.
comingSoon.subtitle: TruthDB isn't open to the public yet. If you have preview access, sign in to take a look.
